summary: This is a brief announcement post directing readers to Cathy O'Neil's Bloomberg View column about the opioid crisis. The post contains no substantive content beyond linking to the external article. It serves purely as a cross-posting notice for her blog audience.
key_points: Post is a link announcement to Bloomberg View column
No substantive analysis or argument contained in the blog post itself
References ongoing opioid crisis as the column topic
key_insight: This post contains no original content to analyze—it is merely a pointer to external writing published elsewhere.
